data.title: Trump Fuels Bitcoin Rally, But Where Will It Go Next Year?
data.description: Crypto giant Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) surged beyond the $100,000 mark last week, reaching an all-time high of $103,259.

data.title: XRP's Parabolic Uptrend, Congressman Buys Meme Coins, Fed Chair Powell Likens Bitcoin To Gold And More: This Week In Crypto
data.description:
The past week was a rollercoaster ride in the cryptocurrency market. From XRP’s explosive gain to Shiba Inu’s burning spree, the crypto world was buzzing with activity. Let’s dive into the top stories that shaped the crypto market over the weekend.

data.title: Apple's In-House Modems, Foldable iPhones, And Tim Cook On Cupertino's Future: This Week In Appleverse
Jeff Bezos Advocates Growth, Trump's Tariff Threats, And The Fed's Latest Moves: This Week In Economics
data.description: This week saw major economic discussions, with Jeff Bezos advocating for growth over cost cuts to tackle national debt, Donald Trump's tariff proposals raising trade war concerns, Goldman Sachs warning of economic risks from tariffs, the Federal Reserve hinting at a potential rate cut, and a surprisingly strong U.S. job market in November.
